title: EnderChestPlugin
description: Open your Ender Chest with a command.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The EnderChestPlugin allows players to access their Ender Chest inventory through an easy-to-use command, bypassing the need to physically interact with an Ender Chest block. This plugin is perfect for enhancing convenience on survival servers, adding utility to player ranks, or providing quick access for administrators. By offering a streamlined way to open Ender Chests, it enhances gameplay while keeping permissions management simple. [Here is a detailed breakdown of its features and functionality.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/44)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
